# Fit Project

> A free, privacy-first workout logger with AI-powered smart workout generation. Available on iOS and Android.

Fit Project is a mobile workout app that lets users log workouts and receive AI-generated routines based on their profile and training history. It is completely free with no subscription, no ads, no in-app purchases, and no data collection.

## Core Features

- Workout logging: sets, reps, weight, rest periods, warm-up sets
- Smart Workout Generation: AI-powered Smart Rotation creates personalized routines based on experience level, goals (strength/hypertrophy/endurance), weekly frequency (2-7 days), session duration (15-120 minutes), and available equipment
- Progress tracking: strength curves, personal records, weekly volume, active training time, weekly streaks
- Equipment configuration: dumbbells (with weight ranges), barbells (with plates), cables, bench, kettlebells, pull-up bar, and more — workouts only use equipment you have
- Reps in Reserve (RIR): effort tracking from max effort to very easy, used to adjust future workout suggestions
- Custom templates: create your own workouts, save completed sessions as templates, build custom weekly routines
- Workout splits: push, pull, lower body, upper body — auto-generated or custom

## Privacy

Fit Project does not sell user data, share data with third parties, use analytics trackers, or display ads. User workout data is private.

## Pricing

Fit Project is completely free. There is no subscription, no premium tier, no in-app purchases, and no planned monetization. It is a passion project built by an independent developer.

## Platforms

- iOS (Apple App Store)
- Android (Google Play Store)

## Links

- Website: https://fitproject.app
